description: Install dependencies and verify the build and existing tests pass before making any code changes.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/movistan to install all dependencies
Run npx prisma generate to generate the Prisma client
Run npm run build to confirm the project compiles without errors
Run npm run test to confirm existing tests pass (note: tests require database, some may be skipped if no DB)
Run npm run lint to confirm no existing lint errors
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint reports no errors (warnings acceptable)
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0
findings: npm install, prisma generate, build (next build), and lint all pass successfully. Tests: 74/89 pass, 15 fail across 5 test files (database-stores, round-orchestrator, crash-recovery, artifact-provenance, summary-services). All failures are pre-existing SQLite database lock timeouts (SQLITE_BUSY: database is locked / SocketTimeout) - the production.db file is locked and tests cannot write to it. This is an environment constraint, not a code issue. Non-DB tests (agent-tool-loop, state-projector, prompt-builder, context-assembler, output-validator, github-fetcher, repo-file-selector) all pass.
